prompt: The provided image shows a young woman standing full-length, photographed straight-on in a studio, in a vivid SCARLET RED cotton midi dress with a fine tonal pinstripe, thin straps, a shirred bodice and a full flowing skirt, with flat strappy sandals. Keep HER 100% identical and untouched - exact face, hair, skin tone, body, pose, arms, hands, and especially the scarlet red pinstripe dress and its precise colour. Do NOT alter, repaint, recolour, restyle, resize, sharpen or move any part of her or her dress. Treat her as a locked fixed foreground layer. Replace ONLY the plain studio backdrop behind and beneath her with the new scene, compositing her in completely unchanged and standing naturally grounded. New background: a FLAT wall of muted blue-and-white glazed azulejo tiles with a single weathered sage-green painted wooden shutter mounted flush against the wall to one side (no depth, no angle); soft natural daylight; realistic restrained colour; worn stone ledge at her feet. CRITICAL geometry: the background MUST be a FLAT wall parallel to the camera, shot straight-on at her eye level - NO receding perspective, NO converging diagonals, NO alley or floor angling away. Show only a small strip of ground at her feet. REALISM: match the soft even frontal studio light exactly and wrap a little onto the wall; add a soft grounded contact shadow under her sandals; render the wall with real surface texture and a gentle shallow depth of field; add subtle natural photographic film grain so the whole frame reads as one real photograph, not a CGI render. Native 2:3 vertical portrait, photoreal editorial fashion photography, seamless compositing, no text, no extra people, no florals near the dress.
